# GOVERNED_INTENT_TRANSFER_PACKAGE_V1

This milestone introduces explicit governed intent transfer packaging between
conversational reasoning and AiGOL governance ingress.

## Scope

- deterministic inert transfer envelopes
- replay-visible transfer identities
- preview-first transfer semantics
- explicit confirmation preservation

## Boundary Statement

This transfer package is non-executing and requires explicit governance preview and confirmation.

## Boundary

Transfer packages do not execute, dispatch, orchestrate, retry, continue hidden
work, scrape pages, ingest full conversations, or issue authority.
